title: Page 4 Deep-Dive Measurement Comparison
status: Detailed measurements extracted - Ready for corrections

top_region_tank_system.name: TOP: Tank & System Components

example.description: Tank outline, distribution box, piping connections, labels

current.description: Tank outline present but missing detailed components

difference.severity: CRITICAL - Missing nearly half the expected content

probable_causes: Septic tank is rendered too small
Distribution box not positioned or sized correctly
Component proportions incorrect relative to field
required_fixes: Check tank dimensions in code (should be ~45-50% of width)
Verify distribution box size and position relative to tank
Ensure inlet/outlet pipes are drawn from tank
Add dimension arrows and labels for tank

middle_region_field_layout.name: MIDDLE: Disposal Field Layout

example.description: Field grid rows, observation holes, property lines, spacing annotations

current.description: Field grid rendered with cell details, observation holes present

difference.severity: ACCEPTABLE - Slightly more detail is fine

middle_region_field_layout.status: ✓ FIELD LAYOUT IS GOOD - Minimal adjustments needed
minor_notes: Row labels and spacing look appropriate
Cell proportions match example reasonably well

bottom_region_scale_table.name: BOTTOM: Scale, Table & Annotations

example.description: Setback requirements table, scale bar, north arrow, legend

current.description: Table and scale present but over-sized or with extra content

difference.severity: HIGH - More than double the expected content

probable_causes: Table has too much padding or is taller than example
Scale bar or legend is oversized
Text sizes are larger than example
Table may have duplicate rows or entries
required_fixes: Shrink scale bar and legend proportionally
Reduce text sizes to match example
Verify row heights and cell padding match example

correction_priority.name: Tank & System Components (TOP region)
fixes: Verify tank rendering function is being called
Check tank size calculation (width should be ~50% of page width)
Ensure piping from tank is drawn
Verify labels and dimension lines are present

correction_priority.name: Scale/Table Sizing (BOTTOM region)
fixes: Reduce table height to ~50% of current
Scale down legend and scale bar by ~40%
Check for duplicate content in table
Verify margins and padding match example

correction_priority.name: Field Layout Fine-tuning (MIDDLE region)
fixes: Verify cell dimensions match expected grid
Verify row/column labels are correctly positioned

next_steps: 1. Examine site_plan_generator.py (or equivalent) for Page 4 rendering code
2. Identify tank rendering function and verify it's being called
3. Create specific measurement extraction for each sub-element
4. Apply corrections in priority order (Tank → Table → Field)
5. Re-generate and compare pixel similarity after each fix
